feature.name: Web App Manifest: specify update eligibility, icon urls are Cache-Control: immutable
feature.creator: dibyapal@google.com
feature.summary: Specify an update eligibility algorithm in the manifest spec. This makes the update process more deterministic and predictable, giving the dev more control over whether (and when) updates should apply to existing installations, and allowing removal of the 'update check throttle' that user agents currently need to implement to avoid wasting network resources.
